description: Blockchain USD (USDB), launched in 2023, is a revolutionary stablecoin dedicated to crypto-trading payments for CEXes and DEXes. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 USDB provides global users and traders instant settlement, fixed ultra-low gas fees, unmatched TPS, and stable value across the Web3 space. As a lawful stablecoin, USDB is backed 1:1 by USD-related stablecoins and high-value crypto assets.
name: Blockchain USD
